The '''''Robida Colossus''''' was a [[Ganathan]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] that intercepted and rescued the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] after it was chased into a dangerous [[Nebula/Legends|nebula]] into Ganathan space. Like most of Ganathan technology, the ship was powered mainly through the power of steam.

The [[Captain/Legends|captain]] was [[Ussor]].

{{Ship-stub}}
